name: dynamical-memory-engine
description: Provenance-first structural memory runtime and JSON inspection runners.

scripts.test:probe: node tests/test_probe_report_receipts.js && node tests/test_identity_probe_multiscale.js && node tests/test_identity_probe_scale_calibrated.js && node tests/test_spectral_concentration_probe.js && node tests/test_tighter_band_real_source_probe.js
scripts.test:core: npm run test:substrate && npm run test:anomaly-fencing && npm run test:cross-run-dynamics && npm run test:cross-run-session && npm run test:door-one-contracts && npm run test:door-one-executive-lane && npm run test:door-one-ingest-hardening && npm run test:door-one-live-provenance-retention && npm run test:door-one-provenance-digest && npm run test:door-one-workbench && npm run test:gate-benchmark-metastable-hold && npm run test:merge-fencing && npm run test:orchestrator && npm run test:query-posture && npm run test:receipt-schemas && npm run test:tiny-filesystem-runner && npm run test:workbench-lm-wrapper && npm run test:local-lm-benchmark
scripts.test:active: npm run test:core && npm run test:reconstruction
